summary: Iteration 9 testing complete. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all new features working: Admin Credentials tab with Create Teacher/Counsellor forms, Block/Delete user functionality, Counsellor tracking bar chart, Rejected assignments with Reassign button, Counsellor student search, and Wallet color fix (green for credits, red for debits).

backend: POST /api/admin/create-teacher - Admin can create teacher account (200)
POST /api/admin/create-counsellor - Admin can create counsellor account (200)
GET /api/history/search?q= - Empty query returns empty array (200)
frontend: Admin Dashboard loads with all 9 tabs
Admin Credentials tab: Create Teacher form visible (name, email, password, button)
Admin Credentials tab: Create Counsellor form visible (name, email, password, button)
Admin Credentials tab: Password Reset form visible (email, password, button)
Admin Credentials tab: User search input visible
Admin Credentials tab: Block/Delete buttons visible for non-admin users (13 each)
Admin Counsellors tab: Counsellor tracking cards visible
Admin Counsellors tab: View Daily Stats button visible and clickable
Admin Counsellors tab: Bar chart displays with Allotments, Leads/Demos, Sessions/Proofs
Counsellor Dashboard: Rejected Assignments section visible
Counsellor Dashboard: 'Reassign to Another Teacher' button visible
Counsellor All Students page: Search bar visible and functional
Counsellor All Students page: Search filters students by name
Wallet Page: Green (+) for positive amounts (credits)
Wallet Page: Red (-) for negative amounts (debits)
Wallet Page: Transaction history shows correct colors

features_verified.admin_create_teacher: WORKING - POST /api/admin/create-teacher creates teacher with auto-generated teacher_code
features_verified.admin_block_user: WORKING - POST /api/admin/block-user blocks/unblocks users, blocked users get 403 on login
features_verified.admin_delete_user: WORKING - POST /api/admin/delete-user permanently deletes non-admin users
features_verified.admin_credentials_tab_ui: WORKING - Shows Create Teacher, Create Counsellor, Reset Password forms and user list with Block/Delete
features_verified.counsellor_daily_stats: WORKING - GET /api/admin/counsellor-daily-stats/{id} returns daily activity data
features_verified.counsellor_tracking_bar_chart: WORKING - Bar chart displays Allotments, Leads/Demos, Sessions/Proofs
features_verified.history_search_fix: WORKING - GET /api/history/search returns assignments and demos
features_verified.counsellor_rejected_assignments: WORKING - Shows rejected assignments with 'Reassign to Another Teacher' button
features_verified.counsellor_student_search: WORKING - All Students page has search bar that filters by name/email
features_verified.wallet_color_fix: WORKING - Green (+) for credits, Red (-) for debits based on amount sign

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 features fully tested and working. Admin Credentials tab allows creating teacher/counsellor accounts, blocking/deleting users. Counsellor tracking shows bar chart with daily stats. History search returns assignments and demos. Counsellor dashboard shows rejected assignments with reassign button. Counsellor All Students page has search bar. Wallet page correctly shows green for credits and red for debits. All backend endpoints working correctly with proper authorization checks.
